SELECT value, toInt32OrNull(value) AS int_value FROM test_table WHERE int_value IS NULL;
SELECT SUM(toInt32OrNull(value)) AS total_int_value FROM test_table;
SELECT value, toInt32OrNull(value) AS int_value FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table) WHERE int_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE toInt32OrNull(value) IS NOT NULL GROUP BY toInt32OrNull(value);
SELECT DISTINCT toInt32OrNull(CONCAT('1', '23')) AS distinct_int_values FROM test_table;
SELECT (SELECT toInt32OrNull(value) FROM test_table WHERE value = '3.14') + (SELECT toInt32OrNull(value) FROM test_table WHERE value = '-32') AS sum_result;
CREATE TABLE test_table2 (id Int32, test_value String);
SELECT id, toInt32OrNull(test_value) AS converted_value FROM test_table2 WHERE converted_value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY id;
SELECT AVG(toInt32OrNull(test_value)) AS average_value FROM test_table2;
WITH (SELECT SUM(toInt32OrNull(value)) FROM test_table) AS sum_values SELECT (sum_values / COUNT(*)) AS average_conversion FROM test_table;
